# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure Virtual Machines running our web application. Include OS and data disks with default settings for quick deployment. Focus on getting VMs running - we'll add disk encryption and security features in phase 2 after validating the architecture.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

resources:
  parameters:
    vmNamePrefix: string
    adminUsername: string
    adminPassword: securestring
    location: string
    vnetId: string
    subnetId: string
    osDiskSizeGB: number
    imagePublisher: string
    imageOffer: string
    imageSkus: string
    dataDiskCount: number
    dataDiskSizeGB: number

  variables:
    vmSize: 'Standard_F2'

  variables:
    vmId: '[concat(parameters('vmNamePrefix'), uniquestring(resourceGroup().id))]'

  resources:
    - type: Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines
      apiVersion: 2019-12-01
      name: '[variables.vmId]'
      location: '[parameters.location]'
      properties:
        osProfile:
          computerName: '[variables.vmId]'
          adminUsername: '[parameters.adminUsername]'
          adminPassword: '[parameters('adminPassword')]'
        hardwaresize: '[variables.vmSize]'
        plan:
          publisher: '[parameters.imagePublisher]'
          offer: '[parameters.imageOffer]'
          sku: '[parameters.imageSkus]'
        networkProfile:
          id: '[parameters.vnetId]'
          subnets:
            - id: '[parameters.subnetId]'
        storageProfile:
          imageReference:
            publisher: '[parameters.imagePublisher]'
            offer: '[parameters.imageOffer]'
            sku: '[parameters.imageSkus]'
            version: 'latest'
          osDisk:
            name: '[concat(variables.vmId), "osdisk"]'
            caching: ReadWrite
            createOption: FromImage
            managedDisk:
              storageAccountType: Standard_LRS
              diskSizeGB: '[parameters.osDiskSizeGB]'
        deallocationFrequency: 'Never'

  variables:
    dataDisks: []

  for each: [range(parameters('dataDiskCount'))] do begin
    arrayIndex: '[slice(variables.dataDisks, _)]'
    variables:
      dataDiskName: '[concat(variables.vmId), "datadisk", arrayIndex]'
    resources:
      - type: Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines/dataDisks
        apiVersion: 2019-12-01
        name:
          value: '[variables.dataDiskName]'
        parent:
          id: '[resourceId('Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines', variables.vmId)]'
        properties:
          createOption: Emptymd
          lun: '[add(arrayIndex, 0)]'
          managedDisk:
            storageAccountType: Standard_LRS
            diskSizeGB: '[parameters.dataDiskSizeGB]'
            id: '[resourceId('Microsoft.Compute/disks', variables.dataDiskName)]'
          caching: None
  endfor
